hard_constraints: Each output image is one complete vertical 9:16 comic page.
Do not create a nine-grid collage, contact sheet, or one image containing all pages.
Do not create nine variations of the same scene.
Keep the nine pages as a continuous story sequence.

style_bible.base_style: cinematic comic realism with sharp classic manga page grammar
style_bible.layout_directive: Use classic manga page grammar: splash panels, inset reaction panels, diagonal cuts, border-breaking SFX, silent beat panels, close-up strips, and irregular gutters. Avoid nine pages of flat top-to-bottom strips.
style_bible.rendering: dramatic rim lighting, hyper detailed textures, bold black panel borders, clear gutters, printed comic page feeling
style_bible.color_script: high contrast cinematic palette matched to story mood

character_locks.name: 角色名
character_locks.lock_prompt: stable face, stable costume, stable body type, stable signature prop across all pages

comic_text_system.dialogue: speech bubble containing clear legible Chinese text
comic_text_system.narration: rectangular caption box containing clear legible Chinese text
comic_text_system.inner_monologue: thought bubble or inner monologue caption containing clear legible Chinese text
comic_text_system.sfx: large hand-lettered comic SFX text integrated inside the panel

pages.source_fragment: 填入第1页对应小说片段

panels.action: 填入第1页最大视觉钩子

pages.positive_prompt: vertical 9:16 comic page, Page 1 opening hook, splash-with-insets classic manga layout, dynamic manga paneling, dramatic inked line art, bold black gutters, screentone shadows, one dominant splash panel plus two overlapping reaction insets, fill in the exact visual action for page 1

panel_ratios: three overlapping small reaction insets 15% each

pages.positive_prompt: vertical 9:16 comic page, Page 9 aftermath cliffhanger, border-breaking-cliffhanger manga layout, extreme close-up plus large negative-space threat panel and tiny final sting panel, black gutter suspense, SFX breaking panel border, fill in the exact visual action for page 9

global_negative_prompt: nine-grid collage, contact sheet, single image containing all pages, nine variations of the same scene, duplicated composition, inconsistent character face, mismatched costume, unreadable Chinese text, wrong Chinese characters, speech bubble outside panel, caption outside panel, deformed hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, distorted face, low resolution, blurry, watermark, signature, logo
